openFindings.title: description.json parentChain still points at the pre-renumbered ancestor chain
openFindings.description: The packet's canonical parentChain still includes 010-search-and-routing-tuning even though the packet now lives under 001-search-and-routing-tuning, so ancestry-derived tooling can read stale lineage.

transitions.reason: Final persistence check still showed stale ancestry

openFindings.title: plan.md still cites a missing ../research/research.md authority source
openFindings.description: The execution plan still anchors its predicate and corpus claims to ../research/research.md even though the packet's derived source-doc inventory no longer includes any research artifact at the current location.

transitions.reason: Migration recheck confirmed the citation still points outside the current packet surface

openFindings.title: decision-record.md still cites the same missing research artifact
openFindings.description: The ADR repeats the missing ../research/research.md authority path, so the packet's rationale cannot be traced back to the referenced source from the current packet layout.

transitions.reason: Migration recheck confirmed the ADR still cites a non-current source path

openFindings.title: Checklist evidence points at stale parser line numbers
openFindings.description: The checklist marks blocking claims complete using parser line ranges that now point at unrelated code, weakening checklist_evidence traceability for the packet's claimed completion state.

transitions.reason: Traceability recheck showed the checklist still cites stale code offsets

openFindings.title: graph-metadata.json still stores alias duplicates for the same implementation files
openFindings.description: The artifact keeps both canonical .opencode/skill/... paths and shorter mcp_server/... aliases for the same files, which wastes key-file slots and muddies downstream audits despite the packet summary claiming a clean file surface.

transitions.reason: Maintainability recheck confirmed the alias duplicates remain in the persisted artifact
